current_limitations: M7E indicates latest observation must not be described as current intraday movement.
holiday schedule records missing; weekday heuristic only
ai_guidance_summary.currentness_language_guardrail: Use M7E currentness_label before describing whether latest observations are live/current; never convert observations into trading signals or recommendations.

market_clock_session_state.ai_currentness_summary: Market session is not current for live discussion; treat observations as not-current reference context.

recommended_operator_workflow: Review Conversation Context JSON/Markdown as the AI handoff package.
Treat Canonical Summary as Level 1 historical context, not Latest Observation.
Treat reference-only or unavailable observations as not current price.
If freshness is insufficient, run only the existing bounded explicit observation runner later.

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Describes only items in the configured watchlist/latest observation payload.
coverage_catalog.description: Summary of the currently observed watchlist payload only.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not imply full market coverage or market-wide direction.
coverage_catalog.name: Bounded observed market snapshot

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: M7D may aggregate availability but does not redefine price semantics.
coverage_catalog.description: Latest observed price state per watchlist item from M7A/M7B/M7C dependencies.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not reinterpret reference values as current market data.
coverage_catalog.name: Current price state

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Deferred until a market clock/session-state policy exists.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not invent session clock semantics in M7D-00/01.
coverage_catalog.name: Session position

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Compare only against an index-like item present in the same watchlist with observations/metrics.
coverage_catalog.description: Bounded relationship to index-like watchlist items such as TAIEX if present.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not infer market prediction or full Taiwan market direction.
coverage_catalog.name: Market index context

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Compare only against futures-like items present in the same watchlist.
coverage_catalog.description: Bounded relationship to TAIFEX/TX-like watchlist items if present.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not infer basis, fair value, or futures-led direction unless explicitly supported by later policy.
coverage_catalog.name: Futures context

coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not be called market breadth or generalized to full market breadth.
coverage_catalog.name: Watchlist breadth

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Descriptive comparison among observed watchlist items.
coverage_catalog.description: Factual comparison of watchlist items by deterministic metrics such as change_percent.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not rank as a recommendation or trading instruction.
coverage_catalog.name: Cross-instrument differences

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: M7D may summarize availability while preserving upstream caveats.
coverage_catalog.description: Bounded observation of current volume fields if available.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not treat volume as capital flow or broad participation.
coverage_catalog.name: Current volume observations

coverage_catalog.description: Displayed top-5 quote/depth context from M7C metrics.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not infer true liquidity, full order book, support/resistance, or main force.
coverage_catalog.name: Displayed order book depth snapshot

coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not invent market timing or session state.
coverage_catalog.name: Source freshness delay failure

coverage_catalog.description: Summarize missing required context fields across watchlist items.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not convert missingness into direction or recommendation.
coverage_catalog.name: Missing fields context

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Describes quality/freshness limitations within current watchlist.
coverage_catalog.description: Identify stale/reference-only/degraded observations inside bounded watchlist.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not call stale observations market direction.
coverage_catalog.name: Stale observations context

coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not implement official EOD in M7D.
coverage_catalog.name: Official EOD context

coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not implement history in M7D.
coverage_catalog.name: Recent historical context

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Reference existing caveats without changing source-health behavior.
coverage_catalog.description: Existing source-health caveats reflected in bounded context.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not change source-health behavior in M7D-00/01.
coverage_catalog.name: Source health caveats

coverage_catalog.description: Source, adapter, retrieved_at, and evidence lineage.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not fabricate lineage or retrieved_at values.
coverage_catalog.name: Data provenance

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Required caveats for any future bounded cross-context output.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not omit no-go caveats from future builder output.
coverage_catalog.name: Semantic limitations

coverage_catalog.description: Frontend/operator card, workbench layout, copy-to-AI rendering.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not build frontend in M7D-00/01.
coverage_catalog.name: Frontend operator presentation

coverage_catalog.allowed_interpretation: Schema only in M7D-00/01; controlled exposure deferred to M7D-04.
coverage_catalog.forbidden_interpretation: Must not expose M7D to conversation context before controlled integration.
coverage_catalog.name: AI discussion handoff

canonical_summary.distinction: Canonical is reviewed Level 1 context and is not the same as Latest Observation Level 2 output.

market_clock_session_state.ai_currentness_summary: Market session is not current for live discussion; treat observations as not-current reference context.
semantic_caveats: Builder output is not safe for direct AI context until controlled promotion is implemented.
Holiday records missing; weekday heuristic only and official holiday correctness is unknown.
